OUR MENU

Fresh. Bold. Unapologetic.

01

Specialty Rolls

Crafted by our kitchen team, each roll is a study in contrast — texture, temperature, heat.

Classic Dragon

$18

Tempura shrimp, cucumber, topped with avocado & tobiko

Rainbow Roll

$19

Crab, cucumber, avocado, topped with assorted sashimi

Spider Roll

$17

Soft shell crab, cucumber, avocado, spicy mayo

Volcano 🌶️

$20

Spicy tuna, cucumber, topped with baked scallop & sriracha

Dynamite 🌶️

$18

Shrimp tempura, avocado, cucumber, topped with spicy salmon

Black Widow

$21

Lobster, mango, avocado, wrapped in black rice, ponzu glaze

Rock & Roll

$16

Salmon, cream cheese, cucumber, deep fried with teriyaki drizzle

Golden Gate 🌶️

$19

Yellowfin tuna, jalapeño, yuzu mayo, crispy shallots

Pitt Street Roll

$22

Bluefin toro, truffle oil, microgreens, gold leaf

Detroit River

$17

Smoked salmon, cream cheese, capers, everything bagel crunch

Motor City

$18

Wagyu beef, asparagus, truffle aioli, tempura flakes

Purple Rain

$16

Salmon, avocado, purple cabbage slaw, ginger vinaigrette

Sunset Strip 🌶️

$20

Spicy scallop, mango, cucumber, topped with seared tuna

Back in Black

$18

Blackened salmon, cream cheese, cucumber, squid ink drizzle

The Closer

$21

King crab, avocado, cucumber, topped with torched salmon & caviar

Winding Road

$17

Eel, avocado, topped with sweet eel sauce & sesame

Free Bird 🌶️

$16

Tempura chicken, avocado, red pepper, honey sriracha

06

Sliders

$6 each or 3 for $15

Small format. Big flavour. Mix and match — that's the whole point.

The OG Smash

$6

Double smash patty, American cheese, special sauce, pickles

Crispy Chicken

$6

Nashville-style fried chicken thigh, coleslaw, honey butter

Wagyu Burger

$6

Wagyu patty, aged cheddar, caramelized onion, truffle aioli

Pulled Pork

$6

Slow-smoked pork, apple slaw, bourbon BBQ sauce

Spicy Shrimp 🌶️

$6

Crispy shrimp, jalapeño slaw, sriracha mayo

Lobster Roll

$6

Atlantic lobster, lemon butter, chive, toasted brioche

Black Bean

$6

House black bean patty, avocado, pickled onion, chipotle aioli

BBQ Brisket

$6

12-hour smoked brisket, aged cheddar, house pickles, onion rings

Mushroom Truffle

$6

Portobello, gruyère, truffle oil, arugula, balsamic

The Closer

$6

Double wagyu, double cheese, bacon, special sauce, lettuce, tomato

08

Cocktails

Liquid Vinyl — drinks inspired by the records we love.

American Woman 🌶️

$14

Tequila blanco, cucumber, jalapeño, lime, agave, salt rim

Upgrade to Casamigos Reposado +$4

T.N.T. 🌶️

$13

Bourbon, ginger beer, habanero shrub, lemon, honey

Upgrade to Blanton's Single Barrel +$6

Night Moves 🌶️

$14

Mezcal, blood orange, ancho chili liqueur, lime, smoked salt

Upgrade to Del Maguey Vida +$5

Hot Blooded 🌶️

$13

Vodka, serrano-infused watermelon, lime, tajín rim

Upgrade to Grey Goose +$4

$12

Gin, elderflower, grapefruit, rosemary, tonic

Purple Rain

$13

Butterfly pea tea vodka, lavender, lemon, honey, prosecco float

$12

Rum, coconut, pineapple, lime, toasted coconut rim

Midnight Rider

$13

Whisky, cold brew, kahlúa, cream, chocolate bitters

Rolling Stone

$12

Aperol, prosecco, blood orange, rosemary sprig

Rhiannon

$14

Upgrade to Hendrick's +$3

$11

Bourbon, honey, lemon, angostura bitters — a classic done right

Upgrade to Knob Creek +$4

$15

Cognac, Chambord, lychee, lime, edible galaxy shimmer

Golden Years

$12

Champagne, peach purée, elderflower, orange bitters

Tiny Dancer

$13

Tequila, blue curaçao, lime, agave, tajín, citrus salt
